name: Google Drive Invoice Summary Email Agent — captured from live agent
description: Reverse-engineered from live agent 6ef48513-f49c-4635-b0dc-bdd9bf2f80a6 (created 2026-06-02). Reads invoice files from a Google Drive folder, extracts invoice fields per file inside a scatter_gather loop, computes roll-up totals, and emails an HTML summary table via Gmail. NOTABLE: the EP lists `document-extractor` in services_involved and the Phase 1 IC correctly emits an `extract` step with `document/extract_structured_data`, but Phase 2 binding does NOT bind it to the document-extractor plugin — the compiler routes extraction to an `ai_processing` step instead (plugins_used = google-drive, google-mail only). This matches the live agent's stored steps (scatter_gather + ai_processing, no bound extractor) and is the document-extractor-vs-AI-extraction behavior this scenario locks in. Captured headless via tests/v6-regression/scripts/capture-scenario-from-agent.ts (mirrors /api/v6/generate-ir-intent-contract Phases 0-4). Phase 1 is non-deterministic — snapshot reflects the 2026-06-09 capture run.

status.compile: PASS — verified 2026-06-09 (IC compiles to a 9-step DSL).
status.phase_d: NOT RUN — not yet validated via run-regression.ts Phase D.
status.phase_e: NOT RUN — this is the compile-suite (IC-based) capture; Phase E live was exercised on the sibling `-asis` scenario instead.

exercises: document-extractor selection: IC emits document/extract_structured_data but binding routes to ai_processing rather than the document-extractor plugin (plugins_used = google-drive, google-mail)
scatter_gather per-file extraction loop over Google Drive files
aggregate roll-up totals (sum of invoice amounts) feeding an HTML summary email
Contrast with contracts-googledocs-v2ui-pipeline-a (Google Docs content read + internal AI date extraction)
known_weaknesses: Phase 1 LLM emission is non-deterministic; a re-run may emit a different IC (e.g. bind the extract step to document-extractor, or change step count). Reproduction of this exact snapshot is not guaranteed.

Agent's IntentContract / data_schema are NOT persisted on the agents row (agent_config has only ai_context + creation_metadata), so this snapshot was regenerated via a fresh LLM run rather than read back from the agent.
